name: transfer
title: Transfer
description: Transfer CVM coins or fungible tokens to another account. Amounts in copper for CVM (1 CVM = 1,000,000,000 copper).

address.description: Origin account address (e.g. '#13'). Transaction executes from this account.

amount.description: Amount to transfer (copper for CVM, token units for fungible tokens)

seed.description: Ed25519 seed (64 hex chars) for the origin account. SECURITY: Sent to peer — use HTTPS only.

token.description: Token actor address for fungible token transfer (e.g. '#128'). Omit or nil for native CVM coin.

value.description: Resulting CVM value from the transfer

errorCode.description: CVM error code if the transfer failed

info.description: Execution metadata including juice used, fees, and transaction hash
